🧠 ABOUT PROJECT

BIHAR KE BAHUBALI MUSIC BOT ek powerful Telegram bot hai jo Telegram voice chat me direct music aur video stream karta hai.

Matlab group me voice chat chalu karo aur bot se bolo:

/play song name

Aur turant music bajna shuru ho jayega.

Bot ko powerful banane ke liye use hua hai:

- Python
- Pyrogram
- PyTgCalls
- FFmpeg
- MongoDB

Isliye bot fast, stable aur powerful hai.

---

🔥 FEATURES

⚡ Telegram voice chat me real-time music streaming

🎧 High quality audio playback

🎬 Video streaming support

🌍 Multiple music platforms support

📜 Smart queue system

🔁 Auto next song

👮 Admin control commands

🚀 Fast aur stable performance

---

🌍 SUPPORTED PLATFORMS

Platform| Supported
YouTube| ✔
Spotify| ✔
SoundCloud| ✔
Apple Music| ✔
Resso| ✔
Direct Audio Links| ✔

---

⚙ SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS

Bot chalane ke liye chahiye:

Python 3.9+

FFmpeg

MongoDB

Telegram API Credentials

---

⚡ INSTALLATION

Repository clone karo

git clone https://github.com/Biharkebahubali/Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot.git

Directory me jao

cd Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot

Dependencies install karo

pip install -U -r requirements.txt

---

🔑 CONFIGURATION

Environment file rename karo

sample.env → .env

Fir configuration me ye values bharo:

API_ID=your_api_id
API_HASH=your_api_hash
BOT_TOKEN=your_bot_token
OWNER_ID=your_telegram_id
LOGGER_ID=log_group_id
MONGO_URL=mongodb_url
SESSION=session_string

---

🚀 RUN THE BOT

bash start

Bot start hote hi Telegram voice chat me music play karega.

---

🎛 BOT COMMANDS

Command| Kaam
/play| Gaana play karo
/vplay| Video play karo
/pause| Music pause
/resume| Music resume
/skip| Next gaana
/stop| Music band
/queue| Playlist dikhao

---

📂 PROJECT STRUCTURE

Bihari-Telegram-Music-Bot
│
├── bot
├── plugins
├── config
├── utils
├── database
└── start
